Black Panther: Wakanda Forever (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $453,829,060Details
International Box Office $405,379,776
Worldwide Box Office $859,208,836
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,003,470
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,871,175
Total $10,874,645
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Queen Ramonda, Shuri, M’Baku, Okoye and the Dora Milaje fight to protect their nation from intervening world powers in the wake of King T’Challa’s death. As the Wakandans strive to embrace their next chapter, the heroes must band together with the help of War Dog Nakia and Everett Ross and forge a new path for the kingdom of Wakanda.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$181,339,761 (40.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$250,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,396 opening theaters/4,396 max. theaters, 8.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $514,722,508

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 11th, 2022 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 9th, 2022 (Wide), released as Black Panther: Wakanda Forever (黑豹2：瓦干達萬歲) (Taiwan)
November 9th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 9th, 2022 (Wide) (Norway)
November 9th, 2022 (Wide) (Indonesia)
November 9th, 2022 (Wide), released as Black Panther 2: Wakanda Forever (Philippines)
Video Release: February 1st, 2023 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of strong violence, action and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2755 (cert #54071), 10/26/2022)
Running Time: 161 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Black Panther
Cast, crew, or production detail: Sequels Without Their Original Stars
Filming location (country): United States
Geographical setting: Africa
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Death of a Son or Daughter, Underwater
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Queen Ramonda, Shuri, M’Baku, Okoye and the Dora Milaje fight to protect their nation from intervening world powers in the wake of King T’Challa’s death. As the Wakandans strive to embrace their next chapter, the heroes must band together with the help of War Dog Nakia and Everett Ross and forge a new path for the kingdom of Wakanda.
